hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys,json,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
if not f.endswith('.py'):sys.exit(0)
root=None
p=os.path.dirname(f)
while p!=os.path.dirname(p):
    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(p,'pyproject.toml')):root=p;break
    p=os.path.dirname(p)
if not root:sys.exit(0)
r=subprocess.run(['uv','run','python3','-m','py_compile',f],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=root)
if r.returncode!=0:print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'smoke: '+r.stderr.strip()}}))
"

python3 -c "
import sys,json,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
if not f.endswith('.py'):sys.exit(0)
root=None
p=os.path.dirname(f)
while p!=os.path.dirname(p):
    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(p,'pyproject.toml')):root=p;break
    p=os.path.dirname(p)
if not root:sys.exit(0)
r=subprocess.run(['uv','run','ty','check',f],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=root)
out=(r.stdout+r.stderr).strip()
if out and 'All checks passed' not in out:print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'ty: '+out}}))
"

python3 -c "
import sys,json,subprocess,os
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
if not f.endswith('.py'):sys.exit(0)
root=None
p=os.path.dirname(f)
while p!=os.path.dirname(p):
    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(p,'pyproject.toml')):root=p;break
    p=os.path.dirname(p)
if not root:sys.exit(0)
r=subprocess.run(['uv','run','ruff','check','--select','ANN401,RUF013,PLC0415','--no-cache',f],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=root)
out=(r.stdout+r.stderr).strip()
if out and 'All checks passed' not in out and 'No Python files' not in out:print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'ruff (any/none/lazy-import):\n'+out}}))
"
